rag_rules: Fix unresolved references in AGREE contracts by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope or properly declared as helpers.
When AGREE reports 'named thing must be an expression with a type', trace and resolve the first invalid identifier on the same line.
generic_rules: In AGREE annexes, avoid referencing implementation-only subcomponents or ports in type-level contracts.
Ensure all identifiers used in guarantees or assumptions are either visible AADL features or properly declared helper expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE guarantees must reference valid, typed expressions; do not use undefined or improperly scoped identifiers.
Use only visible features or declared helpers in AGREE annex expressions to prevent 'named thing must be an expression with a type' errors.
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to resolve AGREE reference errors; instead, fix or remove invalid clauses.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about property associations
AGREE validator diagnostics about missing components in type contracts
